naturalMeaning: 为团队或项目设定长远目标和方向，让大家知道我们要去哪里
example: As a leader, your job is to set the vision and then get out of the way.
exampleTranslation: 作为领导，你的职责是设定愿景，然后别挡路。

expression: get everyone on the same page
literalTranslation: 让所有人都在同一页上
naturalMeaning: 确保团队成员对目标、计划或现状有一致的理解和认知，避免误解
example: Let's have a quick sync to get everyone on the same page before we move forward.
exampleTranslation: 我们在推进之前快速同步一下，确保大家对现状理解一致。

naturalMeaning: 清楚地向团队展示未来的计划和关键里程碑
example: I'm gonna lay out the roadmap for Q3 so everyone knows what's coming.
exampleTranslation: 我来展示一下Q3的路线图，让大家知道接下来要做什么。

expression: point us in the right direction
literalTranslation: 把我们指向正确的方向
naturalMeaning: 引导团队朝正确的方向前进，给予明确的指导
example: We're a bit lost on this one — can you point us in the right direction?
exampleTranslation: 这个我们有点迷茫，你能给我们指条明路吗？

naturalMeaning: 制定行动计划或战略方向，决定怎么走
example: We need to chart the course for the next six months and stick to it.
exampleTranslation: 我们需要制定接下来六个月的行动计划，然后坚持执行。

naturalMeaning: 用生动的语言向团队描述未来的愿景或目标状态
example: Let me paint the picture of what success looks like six months from now.
exampleTranslation: 让我给大家描绘一下六个月后成功的样子是什么样的。

naturalMeaning: 明确团队的前进方向，不迷茫
example: I want everyone on the team to know where we're headed and why it matters.
exampleTranslation: 我希望团队每个人都知道我们的方向以及为什么这事很重要。

naturalMeaning: 团队的核心指导原则或长期目标，用来衡量所有决策的对错
example: User satisfaction is our north star — every decision should come back to that.
exampleTranslation: 用户满意度就是我们的北极星——每个决策都应该回归到这个原则上。

naturalMeaning: 激发某人的热情和动力，让他充满干劲
example: A good leader knows how to fire the team up before a big launch.
exampleTranslation: 好的领导知道如何在重大发布前点燃团队的干劲。

naturalMeaning: 让团队成员对某个项目或目标产生热情和期待
example: You need to get people excited about where we're going, not just tell them what to do.
exampleTranslation: 你需要让大家对我们的方向感到兴奋，而不仅仅是指挥他们做事。

naturalMeaning: 在关键时刻把团队凝聚起来，鼓舞士气
example: When things get tough, that's when you really need to rally the troops.
exampleTranslation: 事情变得棘手的时候，才是真正需要你鼓舞士气的时候。

naturalMeaning: 维持团队的积极心态和工作热情，防止沮丧和倦怠
example: After the reorg, it's been tough to keep morale up — people are nervous.
exampleTranslation: 重组之后，维持士气挺难的，大家都很紧张。

naturalMeaning: 在团队需要动力时发表简短有力的鼓励讲话
example: Before the product launch, the VP came in and gave us a pep talk.
exampleTranslation: 产品发布前，副总裁进来给我们打了一针鸡血。

naturalMeaning: 获得团队或利益相关者的支持和认同，让他们愿意配合
example: Before we roll this out, I need to get buy-in from the engineering team.
exampleTranslation: 在推行之前，我需要先获得工程团队的支持。

naturalMeaning: 在团队中展现积极、充满活力的态度，带动气氛
example: When you walk into that room, bring the energy — the team feeds off of you.
exampleTranslation: 你走进那个房间的时候要拿出状态来，团队的情绪是跟着你走的。

naturalMeaning: 言行一致，以身作则，不止是说得好听而是做得到位
example: You can talk all you want, but you gotta walk the walk if you want the team to respect you.
exampleTranslation: 你说什么都行，但要想让团队尊重你，你得先做到位。

naturalMeaning: 把任务或职责交给别人负责
example: I'm going to hand this project off to Sarah — she's got the bandwidth to run with it.
exampleTranslation: 我准备把这个项目交给Sarah负责，她有时间来推进。

naturalMeaning: 把职责或领导权平稳地移交给下一个人
example: I've been leading this initiative for two years — it's time to pass the baton.
exampleTranslation: 这个项目我已经带两年了，是时候把接力棒交出去了。

naturalMeaning: 减少对团队的控制，给予更多自主权
example: You've been micromanaging — you need to loosen the reins and trust your team.
exampleTranslation: 你一直在微观管理，你需要松一松缰绳，相信你的团队。

naturalMeaning: 授权给某人，让他自主推进任务而不被过多干涉
example: I trust your judgment on this — just let me know what you need and run with it.
exampleTranslation: 这件事我相信你的判断，告诉我你需要什么，然后自己去推进吧。

naturalMeaning: 给予某人权力和信心去做某事，让他自己拿主意
example: I want to empower you to make these decisions without coming to me first.
exampleTranslation: 我希望授权给你直接做这些决定，不用先来找我。

naturalMeaning: 对某件事完全负责，担当起来，不推卸责任
example: If something goes wrong, just own it — don't make excuses.
exampleTranslation: 如果出了问题，就自己扛起来承担责任，不要找借口。

naturalMeaning: 帮某人分担工作，减轻他的负担
example: I'm swamped this week — can you take this off my plate?
exampleTranslation: 我这周忙飞了，你能帮我把这个处理了吗？

naturalMeaning: 某个项目或任务的主要负责人，大家有问题就找他
example: Lisa will be the point person for the migration — direct all questions to her.
exampleTranslation: Lisa将担任迁移工作的主要负责人，所有问题直接找她。

naturalMeaning: 说出分歧或误会，消除紧张气氛，让大家恢复正常沟通
example: There's been some tension lately — let's sit down and clear the air.
exampleTranslation: 最近气氛有些紧张，我们坐下来把话说开吧。

naturalMeaning: 通过对话解决分歧或问题，而不是憋在心里或绕开
example: Instead of letting this fester, let's just talk it out like adults.
exampleTranslation: 与其让这事发酵，不如我们像成年人一样把话说开。

naturalMeaning: 双方意见不合但尊重彼此立场，不再争论下去
example: We're not gonna see eye to eye on this, so let's just agree to disagree and move on.
exampleTranslation: 这件事我们达不成一致，那我们就各自保留意见，继续往前走。

expression: see where someone is coming from
naturalMeaning: 理解别人的立场、角度或出发点，不一定同意但能理解
example: I can see where you're coming from, but I think we need to look at the bigger picture.
exampleTranslation: 我理解你的出发点，但我认为我们还需要看更大的局面。

naturalMeaning: 缩小分歧或差距，找到中间地带让双方达成一致
example: We need someone who can bridge the gap between design and engineering.
exampleTranslation: 我们需要一个能在设计和工程之间搭桥的人。

expression: address the elephant in the room
literalTranslation: 处理房间里的那头大象
naturalMeaning: 直面那个大家都知道但没人愿意提起的敏感问题
example: Nobody wants to talk about the layoff rumors, but let's address the elephant in the room.
exampleTranslation: 没人想谈裁员传闻，但我们还是直面这个显而易见的问题吧。

naturalMeaning: 不互相指责或追究责任，而是聚焦于解决问题
example: Let's not point fingers here — what's done is done. How do we fix it?
exampleTranslation: 咱们别互相指责了，已经这样了。我们怎么解决？

naturalMeaning: 找到双方都认可的共同点或共同利益，作为合作的基础
example: The two teams disagree on the approach, so let's find common ground and work from there.
exampleTranslation: 两个团队在方法上有分歧，我们先找共同点，然后从那开始推进。

naturalMeaning: 做最终决定，掌握决策权，说了算
example: On this project, who's calling the shots?
exampleTranslation: 这个项目谁说了算？

naturalMeaning: 做出一个艰难或重要的决定
example: Someone needs to make the call — are we delaying the release or not?
exampleTranslation: 得有人拍板了——我们到底要不要推迟发布？

naturalMeaning: 在多个选项中最终选择某一个方案
example: After looking at all the options, I think we should go with the first proposal.
exampleTranslation: 看了所有选项之后，我觉得我们应该选第一个方案。

naturalMeaning: 终于做出决定并开始执行某个计划或行动
example: We've been debating this for weeks — it's time to pull the trigger.
exampleTranslation: 我们已经讨论了好几个星期了，是时候拍板执行了。

naturalMeaning: 不急于做决定，先花时间慎重考虑
example: I don't want to rush this. Let me sleep on it and get back to you tomorrow.
exampleTranslation: 我不想仓促做决定，让我回去想想，明天回复你。

expression: put a stake in the ground
naturalMeaning: 明确表明自己的立场或决定，确立一个不可动摇的基准点
example: We need to put a stake in the ground on the deadline so everyone knows what to plan for.
exampleTranslation: 我们需要在截止日期上明确拍板，这样大家才好做计划。

naturalMeaning: 暂时搁置某个议题，延后再讨论（美国用法是将议题延迟讨论）
example: We're not making progress on this — let's table it and revisit next week.
exampleTranslation: 这个议题我们推不动，先放一放，下周再回来看。

naturalMeaning: 把一个讨论、项目或决策顺利完成并收尾
example: We've been debating the design for a month — someone needs to land the plane.
exampleTranslation: 设计方案我们已经讨论一个月了，得有人把这事收尾了。

naturalMeaning: 让某人随时了解最新进展，不把他排除在信息之外
example: Make sure you keep the stakeholders in the loop as we roll this out.
exampleTranslation: 在推行过程中一定要让相关方随时了解进展。

expression: lay your cards on the table
naturalMeaning: 坦诚公开所有信息，不隐瞒真实情况
example: I'm gonna lay my cards on the table — we have way less runway than we thought.
exampleTranslation: 我跟大家摊牌了——我们剩下的资金比预想的少得多。

naturalMeaning: 要求或承诺提前沟通，不让任何人感到意外
example: My management philosophy is simple — no surprises. Tell me bad news early.
exampleTranslation: 我的管理哲学很简单——不要有意外。坏消息要早点告诉我。

naturalMeaning: 领导随时欢迎团队成员来找自己谈话，不必预约
example: I have an open-door policy — if something's on your mind, just come by.
exampleTranslation: 我随时欢迎大家来找我聊，心里有事就直接过来。

naturalMeaning: 揭示幕后的情况，让团队看到平时看不到的信息
example: In the all-hands, the CEO pulled back the curtain on how the investment decision was made.
exampleTranslation: 全员会议上，CEO揭示了投资决策背后的考量过程。

naturalMeaning: 提前通知或提醒某人，让他有所准备
example: Just wanted to give you a heads-up — the budget meeting got moved to Thursday.
exampleTranslation: 提前跟你说一声，预算会议改到周四了。

naturalMeaning: 对某事坦诚、直说，不拐弯抹角
example: I appreciate you being upfront about the timeline — that helps us plan better.
exampleTranslation: 我很感激你坦诚地说了时间线的问题，这有助于我们更好地做计划。

naturalMeaning: 在初次见面或陌生场合中通过轻松话题缓解尴尬气氛
example: Let's do a quick icebreaker so everyone can get to know each other.
exampleTranslation: 我们快速做个破冰活动，让大家互相认识一下。

naturalMeaning: 花时间了解团队成员的个人背景、兴趣和性格
example: The first week is really about getting to know each other and building trust.
exampleTranslation: 第一周其实就是互相了解、建立信任的过程。

naturalMeaning: 通过日常互动建立信任和良好的工作关系
example: Take time to build rapport with your new team members — it makes everything easier.
exampleTranslation: 花时间和新团队成员建立良好的关系——这样后面什么都好办。

naturalMeaning: 团队通过非正式活动增进感情和凝聚力
example: We should plan a team bonding activity this quarter — maybe a hiking trip.
exampleTranslation: 这个季度我们应该搞个团队建设活动，比如去徒步。

naturalMeaning: 营造一个让团队成员敢于表达真实想法和犯错的氛围
example: As a manager, it's your job to create a safe space where people can speak up without fear.
exampleTranslation: 作为管理者，你的职责是创造一个安全的环境，让大家敢于发表意见而不用担心。

naturalMeaning: 定期或主动找某人聊聊，看他状态如何、有没有需要帮助的地方
example: I'll check in with you after the meeting to see how you're feeling about the changes.
exampleTranslation: 会后我找你聊聊，看看你对这些变化感觉怎么样。

naturalMeaning: 办公室里非正式的闲聊，通常发生在茶水间或饮水机旁
example: Some of the best ideas come from watercooler talk, not formal meetings.
exampleTranslation: 最好的创意往往来自茶水间的闲聊，而不是正式会议。

naturalMeaning: 简短地联系或会面，同步信息或确认进展
example: Let's touch base next week to see where things stand.
exampleTranslation: 我们下周简单碰一下，看看进展怎么样。

naturalMeaning: 约个时间聊聊近况、同步信息或了解进展
example: Hey, it's been a while — let's grab coffee and catch up.
exampleTranslation: 嘿，好久没聊了，我们喝杯咖啡聊聊近况吧。

naturalMeaning: 询问对方近况如何，既可以聊工作也可以聊生活
example: How are things going with the new project? Any roadblocks I should know about?
exampleTranslation: 新项目怎么样？有什么障碍需要我知道的吗？

naturalMeaning: 询问对方在想什么、有什么担忧或想法，引导对方说出心里话
example: You seem a bit distracted today — what's on your mind?
exampleTranslation: 你今天看起来有点心不在焉，在想什么呢？

naturalMeaning: 询问对方手头有哪些任务和工作量
example: Before I assign this, let me ask — what's on your plate right now?
exampleTranslation: 在我分配这个任务之前，先问一下——你手头现在都有什么工作？

naturalMeaning: 主动询问对方需要什么帮助或资源，体现管理者的支持角色
example: Tell me what you need from me — how can I support you in hitting this deadline?
exampleTranslation: 告诉我你需要我做什么——我要怎么支持你按时完成？

naturalMeaning: 对员工的工作表现提出建设性的评价，可好可坏
example: I want to give you some feedback on the presentation — overall great, but let's work on the pacing.
exampleTranslation: 我想对你的演示给一些反馈——整体很棒，但节奏方面可以再优化一下。

naturalMeaning: 坦诚直接地跟某人说话，不绕弯子
example: I'm gonna be straight with you — your performance has been slipping lately.
exampleTranslation: 我就跟你直说了——你最近的表现有所下滑。

naturalMeaning: 承担更多责任或提升表现，在面对挑战时挺身而出
example: This is a great opportunity for you to step up and take on more ownership.
exampleTranslation: 这是你挺身而出、承担更多责任的好机会。

naturalMeaning: 提升自己的技能、能力或职业水平到下一个阶段
example: If you want to level up in your career, you need to start thinking more strategically.
exampleTranslation: 如果你想在职业生涯中更上一层楼，就需要开始更有战略性地思考。

naturalMeaning: 挑战自己不熟悉或不擅长的事情，以实现成长
example: I know public speaking isn't your thing, but growth means stepping outside your comfort zone.
exampleTranslation: 我知道公开演讲不是你的强项，但成长就意味着走出舒适区。

naturalMeaning: 让某人通过加速路径更快地晋升或发展
example: We put her on the fast track because she showed exceptional leadership potential.
exampleTranslation: 我们把她列入快速晋升通道，因为她展现了卓越的领导潜力。

naturalMeaning: 以导师身份帮助和指导经验较少的人成长
example: I've been mentoring a junior engineer on the team — it's been really rewarding.
exampleTranslation: 我一直在指导团队里的一位初级工程师，真的很有成就感。

naturalMeaning: 分配给员工的有挑战性的任务，超出其当前能力范围以促成长
example: I'm giving you this as a stretch assignment — it's gonna be hard, but I think you can do it.
exampleTranslation: 我给你的这个任务有一定挑战性，会很难，但我相信你能做到。

naturalMeaning: 相信能力可以通过努力和学习来提高的观念，而不是固定不变的
example: We're hiring for growth mindset — we want people who are always looking to improve.
exampleTranslation: 我们招人看重成长心态——我们想要那些一直在寻求进步的人。

naturalMeaning: 让新成员或需要了解情况的人快速掌握项目的最新进展
example: We have a new developer joining next week — can you help bring them up to speed?
exampleTranslation: 下周有位新开发入职，你能帮他快速了解项目情况吗？
